text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year. I owe you a lot for your
assistance last year.
choice_data_list: Happy New Year to you too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh... I'll be counting on you this year as well.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This year will present still greater challenges than
those we have faced so far.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I trust you are well aware of the lofty ideals I
aspire toward.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Trainer, are you ready for what awaits us?
choice_data_list: Let's go get that Triple Tiara.
Let's go get that Triple Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh, it seems you are indeed prepared.
choice_data_list: Your dreams are my dreams too.
Your dreams are my dreams too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well, well... You really are something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After reaffirming our goals, we take a little
breather.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You know, considering the season, don't you
think you're acting a bit too "business as usual"?
choice_data_list: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Look at your office. Not a single New Year's
decoration in sight.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Seasonal events provide color and variety to our
daily lives. If you wish to have a fulfilling year,
you should pay them more attention.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Holidays and celebrations are highly valued at
Tracen Academy. It would be best for you to
show some holiday spirit as well.
choice_data_list: S-sorry about that...
S-sorry about that...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Surely there's some New Year's tradition you
enjoy? Go on, name it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Just this once, I'll assist you with whatever activity
you choose. I hope you realize how rare an
opportunity this is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
New Year's activities, huh? I suppose I can think
of a few options...
choice_data_list:
Maybe we can put up a big New Year's
decoration?

Let's make some traditional New Year's mochi
soup!
How about some New Year's calligraphy?
How about some New Year's calligraphy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
New Year's activities, huh? I suppose I can think
of a few options...
choice_data_list:
Maybe we can put up a big New Year's
decoration?

Let's make some traditional New Year's mochi
soup!
How about some New Year's calligraphy?
How about some New Year's calligraphy?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Visuals are not a bad way to get into the holiday
spirit. Even if "big" leaves a lot up to
interpretation...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I think the academy has some unused decorations
lying around. We can liven things up if we place
them here.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Come on, then—let's get going. The decorations
aren't going to grow legs and walk here
themselves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once all the decorations are in place, I look
around at our handiwork.
choice_data_list: It's so... New Year's-y!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Almost too much so, if I'm being honest. But yes, I
suppose it's worth a passing grade.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Do you see now how a simple visual change can
affect one's mood? I'm feeling ready to give the
year's first training session my all.
choice_data_list:
Then why don't we get down to that training
session right now?

Then why don't we get down to that training
session right now?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh. Now there's an idea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Revitalized, we head off to our training session
with fresh minds.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You... haven't had any yet?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Unbelievable... Does this holiday mean nothing to
you?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The year doesn't begin until you've had some
mochi soup! We must remedy this at once.
choice_data_list: Is it really that big of a deal?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Of course it is! Now tell me where you were born.
We need to make sure we make you the right
local variant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After being thorougly interrogated, I get to eat
Air Groove's homemade New Year's mochi soup.
In all honesty, I feel quite lucky.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Not a bad suggestion. Writing our aspirations for
the year is a good method to get us motivated.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We have the necessary materials in the student
council office. I'll allow you to use some.
choice_data_list: You ready?
You ready?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I do this every year with the student
council. So what are you going to write?
choice_data_list: "Win the Triple Tiara."

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh... Me too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Using the brushes and ink Air Groove brought, we
each write "Win the Triple Tiara."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though the messages we write are the same, Air
Groove's brush strokes are much bolder and more
beautiful than mine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her penmanship clearly reflects her character.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as we're preparing to begin the year's first
training session...

text_block_list.name: Male Reporter
text_block_list.text: There she is!

text_block_list.name: Female Reporter
text_block_list.text: Air Groove! Trainer! We've been waiting for you!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Reporters, huh? It appears they've already
received permission from the academy.

text_block_list.name: Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to ask some questions about your
plans for your classic year!

text_block_list.name: Female Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Your fans are atwitter about the possibility of you
participating in the Classic Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Do you mind if I take a moment to respond,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove double-checks with me. Our plans
have been set, so I nod in affirmation.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Let me take this opportunity to make an
announcement. In my classic year, I intend to
pursue the Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
W-wow, the Tiara tour! What a scoop! Then that
means...

text_block_list.name: Female Reporter
text_block_list.text:
You'll be running in the Japanese Oaks too,
right?! Are you aiming to continue your mother's
legacy?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
For the time being, I am focusing all of my efforts
on the Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I intend to make my intentions for the Tiara tour
quite clear through my performance in that race.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Now, I have a training session to attend to, so if
you'll excuse me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begins Air Groove's classic year—a fresh
new year filled with hopes and challenges.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Tiara awaits, and first up is the Oka
Sho!
